titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.C. Sprague, M.E. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-10 18:12:36 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Records, scrapbook, publications, correspondence, and photographs.
did.abstract: Includes records of Lambda Alpha International, formerly the International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, which was established in 1931 at Northwestern University by a group of students of land economics and real estate as an honorary professional fraternity to foster the study of land economics.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Martin Heggestad, May 2002 Julia Guarneri, June 2002

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Lambda Alpha International, formerly the International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, was established on February 23, 1931 at Northwestern University by a group of students of land economics and real estate as an honorary professional fraternity to foster the study of land economics. The first chapter, the Ely Chapter in Chicago, was named after Dr. Richard T. Ely for his role as "Father of Land Economics." Other chapters include the George Washington Chapter, Washington, D.C.; the Dixie States Chapter, Atlanta, Georgia; the Flagler Chapter, Miami, Florida; the Golden Gate Chapter, San Francisco, California; the Simcoe Chapter, Toronto, Canada; and the Los Angeles, Philadelphia, San Diego, Honolulu, Tulsa, Minneapolis, New York City, Phoenix, Seattle, and St. Louis Chapters. Membership is by invitation and election only.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Early records consist of a scrapbook of clippings and memorabilia, 1931-1933, and membership lists. Other records of the organization date from 1949 to the present and consist of the charter, constitution, bylaws and materials concerning fraternity history, and bylaws of regional chapters. Also, financial records; correspondence of the presidents' secretaries; chapter records including notices and reports of meetings; agendas and minutes of business and special meetings, and membership data; photographs and publications, including the fraternity journal, newsletters, and yearbooks. Includes records of the Land Economics Foundation and information on the various Biennial Congresses of Lambda Alpha.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Lambda Alpha International Records, #2917. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Lambda Alpha International Records
By-laws of Regional Chapters: Dixie, Ely, Flagler, George Washington, Golden Gate, Los Angeles - 1967 , n.d.
By-laws of Regional Chapters: New York, Philadelphia, Simcoe - 1967 , n.d.
Awards by Lambda Alpha; correspondence, news releases -
Chapter Announcements: Ely (Chicago), George Washington (Washington, D.C.), Golden Gate (San Francisco)
Chapter Announcements: Los Angeles, New York Area, Philadelphia

Chapter Expansion - Correspondence, nomination forms, clippings, photos, memorandum: Atlanta chapter, Michigan chapter, New York chapter, Philadelphia chapter, St. Louis chapter, Toronto chapter, Rho Epsilon merger 1948-1966 , n.d.
Newsletters - drafts and memoranda, Memorial issue
Urban Land Institute - brochure and envelope, Technical Bulletin #60, "Changing Patterns of Land Economics" by Homer Hoyt
Scrapbook of news clippings and memorabilia,
Biennial Congress - Correspondence, agenda, news releases of election
Directory receipts, correspondence, general ledger sheet
General - Grand Council - correspondence, miscellany, membership list
Grand Chapter - Disbursements: correspondence, invoices, statements, treasurer's reports
Grand Chapter - Constitution: correspondence concerning interim edicts and constitution revision
Grand Chapter Officers: instructions, correspondence concerning organizational matters, 2 newsletters 1957 ,
Grand Chapter - Treasurer's reports to officers: correspondence and reports including bank statements, schedules of accounts, reports of membership, etc.
Grand Congress; correspondence concerning nomination of Grand Chapter offices, minutes of nomination committee
Income taxes - evidence to support application for tax exempt status: correspondence, summary of receipts and disbursements, general ledger sheets 1962-67
Information - Treasurer: general instructions, forms used by treasurer, correspondence concerning official jeweller
Land Economics Foundation and Archives correspondence
Land Economics Journal - correspondence concerning Lambda Alpha subscriptions
Chapter Returns - Dixie States (Atlanta, Georgia): correspondence, membership lists, cash journal
Ely (Chicago) - correspondence, membership lists, cash journal
George Washington (Washington, D.C.) - correspondence, membership lists, cash journal
Golden Gate (San Francisco) - correspondence, membership list, cash journal, San Francisco Redevelopment Agency Report
Los Angeles - correspondence, by-laws, membership lists, programs, cash journal
New York Area - correspondence, cash journal
Bank statements, cancelled checks, treasurer's records, record of bank reconciliation, deposit slips, journals, general ledger (assets, revenue, expense, balance sheets)
Hugo-Brunt, M.: member, Simcoe Chapter, International Historian, member Journal Search committee Finch, H.F.: Lambda Alpha - Cornell Project, Lambda Alpha brochure
Harrington, J.J., & Co. Harrington, J.J., Jr., Chicago
Dixie States Chapter - Reports of Chapter Progress
Papers Offered at the Biennial Congress
Kellough - Chairman Urban Affairs Award Case
Vitae of Members (whose publications we do not have)
W.R. Kellough - Chairman, Banquet and Housing Committee
Correspondence, programs, and photos concerning present officers and directors of the Los Angeles Chapter and the new delegation
Interview: Arthur Bohnen and James Massey, Memphis Chapter
Keynotes International, Selected Papers from Biennial Congress, etc.
Lambda Alpha - Cornell University Agreements (H. Finch)
Philadelphia and Puget Sound Chapters Announcements
American Society of Landscape Architects (ASLA) Meeting Manual
Lambda Alpha - Cornell University agreements (H. Finch)
Correspondence with H. Finch especially re. L.A. Brochure
The Lambda Alpha Literary Archives at Cornell University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Urban Development a Guide to the Lambda Alpha Archives at Cornell University

did.unittitle: Lambda Alpha Land Economics Journal: vol. 1, Spring 1978 ; vol.2, 1980 ; vol. 3, 1981 (50th Anniversary Issue)
Lambda Alpha Year Book and Roster
Video Cassette: "Profiles in Courage" converted from 16mm film by John F. Kennedy Foundation - film was at least 25 years old
Video Cassette: Richard T. Ely - "Profiles in Courage"
"Cameron Vallet" - A Public Housing Success Story, Alexandria, Virginia
